ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date when the material was acquired */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the material */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "property_category" TEXT /* Category of the property */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the property */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or documentation for the property measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was tested */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty or margin of error in the measurement */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the metric value */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the test was conducted */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the test was conducted */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the test was conducted */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being tested */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or objective of the test */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Overall result or conclusion of the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the MPMS */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material or report */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material or report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the material */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
